subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter was received. In truth, it was not permissible to undertake this matter personally; however, the government [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید فی الحقیقه تصدی آنقضیه بنفس خویش جائز نبود ولی حکومت
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @relationship between government and people
